factor: Niche selection based on demand data
detail: Gap between Software Dev ($65.8M) and Fiction Books ($32K) is 2,000x. Picking the right niche is the single biggest decision.
Products at $30-49 generate $15M total vs $1.7M for under-$5 products. Higher price doesn't kill volume.
Products with 4.5-4.9 stars average 1,197 sales. Products with no ratings average 18.
Sellers with 4-5 products average 1,681 total sales. Single-product sellers average 269.

factor: Using Pay What You Want pricing
detail: PWYW products average 287 sales vs 265 for fixed-price. But avg price drops from $66.77 to $18.74.
Digital downloads average 293 sales at $47. Courses average 115 sales at $96.
